# The Aggregator API

> B2B game aggregation platform. Server-to-server REST API for casino operators to browse a unified game catalog, launch real-money and demo sessions, and receive HMAC-signed wallet callbacks.

Auth: Bearer token (`sk_live_*` prefix). Base URL: `https://api.aggregator.gg/v1`. Versioning: hybrid path version + `Aggregator-Version` header.

## API contract

- [OpenAPI 3.1 spec (raw YAML)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aggregator-gg/docs/main/openapi/aggregator.yaml): Machine-readable contract. 9 endpoints, full request/response schemas, examples. **This is the source of truth — start here.**
- [Postman collection](https://docs.aggregator.gg/downloads/aggregator.postman_collection.json): Auto-generated from the OpenAPI spec, pre-configured with `base_url` + `apiKey` + `idempotencyKey` variables.
- [Interactive API reference](https://docs.aggregator.gg/api/v1/operations/listgames/): Browseable Redoc-style documentation rendered from the spec.

## Get started

- [Introduction](https://docs.aggregator.gg/get-started/introduction/): What the platform does, who it's for, what you own vs what we handle.
- [Quickstart](https://docs.aggregator.gg/get-started/quickstart/): From `npm install` to first game launch in 15 minutes.
- [Authentication](https://docs.aggregator.gg/get-started/authentication/): API keys, rotation, rate limits, security.
- [Environments & testing](https://docs.aggregator.gg/get-started/environments/): One production environment, welcome credit pack for pre-launch testing, demo sessions for no-money UI flows.
- [How a game round works](https://docs.aggregator.gg/get-started/how-a-round-works/): Full session → bet → win → settle lifecycle with sequence diagram.

## Integration guides

- [Integration walkthrough](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/integration/): Step-by-step from registration to go-live.
- [Code samples](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/code-samples/): TypeScript, PHP, Python snippets for the five essential operations.
- [Wallet callbacks](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/wallet-callbacks/): Receive HMAC-signed bet/win events. Retry semantics, response shapes, edge cases.
- [Signature verification](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/signature-verification/): HMAC-SHA256 verification in TS/PHP/Python with timing-safe compare. The highest-leverage snippet — copy verbatim.
- [Idempotency](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/idempotency/): `Idempotency-Key` header semantics. Required on financial POST endpoints. 24h replay window.
- [Testing your integration](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/testing-sandbox/): Recommended pre-launch test sequence using welcome credits.
- [Going live](https://docs.aggregator.gg/guides/go-live/): 10-item production checklist.

## Reference

- [Error codes](https://docs.aggregator.gg/resources/error-codes/): Full machine-parseable code list (E0xxx-EBxxx) with HTTP status mappings.
- [Versioning policy](https://docs.aggregator.gg/resources/versioning/): Path version `/v1/` for breaking changes, `Aggregator-Version` header for additive minor revisions. 180-day deprecation window. RFC 9745 + RFC 8594 headers.
- [Changelog](https://docs.aggregator.gg/resources/changelog/): Every shipping change to the Machine API.
- [Status](https://status.aggregator.gg): Real-time uptime + incident history for api / cabinet / public site / docs.

## Other languages (SDK generation)

For Java, Go, C#, Ruby, Kotlin, Rust — generate a typed client from the OpenAPI spec:

```sh
npx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate \
  -i https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aggregator-gg/docs/main/openapi/aggregator.yaml \
  -g python \
  -o ./aggregator-client
```
